zh.lifeSummary: 當William Jenkes於1480年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾沃爾維頓時，他的父親Roland Jenkes35歲，母親Mary Moore20歲。他於1505年與Elizabeth Adams在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1571年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Jenkes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire): patronymic, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, from a pet form of the personal names Jukel, Jokel, which are from Breton Judicael and this one from Old Breton Iudicael. The Breton personal name is derived from iuth ‘lord’ with a suffix -ig + hael, hail ‘generous, bountiful’. In England the personal name was particularly common in Yorkshire and Lincolnshire and in districts where Bretons settled after the Norman Conquest. Compare Jewell .

variants.name: Jewell
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): from an Old Breton personal name, Iudhael, composed of elements meaning ‘lord’ + ‘generous, bountiful’ (see Jewkes ), which was borne by a 7th-century Christian saint, a king of Brittany who abdicated and spent the last part of his life in a monastery. Forms of this name are found in medieval records not only in Devon and Cornwall, where they are of native origin, but also in East Anglia and even Yorkshire, where they were imported by Bretons after the Norman Conquest. The name was seemingly reintroduced from France in the 17th century by Huguenots.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When William Jenkes was born in 1480, in Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Roland Jenkes, was 35 and his mother, Mary Moore, was 20. He married Elizabeth Adams in 1505, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1571, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 91, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Jenkes est né en 1480, à Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Roland Jenkes, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mary Moore, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Adams en 1505, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1571, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Jenkes(이)가 1480년 영국 벅잉함실르 울버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roland Jenkes(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Moore(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1505년 영국에서 Elizabeth Adams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Jenkes родился в 1480 г. в местности волвиртон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roland Jenkes было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Moore, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Adams в 1505 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1571 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
